place: Porsche Design Tower, Sukhumvit 38, Thonglor, Bangkok, Thailand
title: Porsche Design Tower — Duplex Sky Villa with Private Pool - Thonglor
blurb: A 525 m² duplex — one of only 22 'Sky Villas' at the Porsche Design Tower Bangkok, Asia's first Porsche-branded residence — with its own heated private pool, a private car gallery reached by a spiral ramp, and panoramic Thonglor skyline views.
detail:
An incredible duplex 'Sky Villa' at the Porsche Design Tower Bangkok — a villa in the sky spanning approximately 525 m² across two levels, one of only twenty-two such residences in the building. A collaboration between Porsche Design and Ananda Development, the tower is Asia's first Porsche-branded residence and one of only three worldwide, rising on Sukhumvit 38 in the heart of Thonglor.

The architecture takes its cues directly from Porsche: an iconic 'X-Frame' structure inspired by the Mission R concept car, private car galleries connected by 'The Loop' spiral car ramp, and automated terrace doors inspired by the 911 Targa that dissolve the line between inside and out. Floor-to-ceiling glazing frames sweeping cityscapes, while the duplex's own heated private pool, gourmet Thai, Western and semi-outdoor BBQ kitchens, and smart air-quality and climate systems define life within.

Residents share an exceptional amenity deck — a 25-metre infinity pool, high-performance gym, dedicated spa, business lounge and private social spaces — with world-class concierge service throughout. Set in vibrant Thonglor, the residence sits among Michelin-starred dining, designer boutiques and nightlife, moments from BTS Thonglor. Completion is expected in 2028.

features.l: 25 m communal infinity pool, gym & spa
